function guaguaExtractNumber(rawName) {
    rawName = String(rawName || "");
    var m = rawName.match(/^\s*0*(\d{1,4})(?:[-_｜\s]|$)/);
    if (m && m[1]) return String(parseInt(m[1], 10));

    // 兼容少数“名称-编号”格式，例如：女青年-惊艳细腻优雅-975
    m = rawName.match(/[-_\s]0*(\d{1,4})(?:\.[A-Za-z0-9]+)?\s*$/);
    if (m && m[1]) return String(parseInt(m[1], 10));

    return "";
}

function guaguaStripBracketText(text) {
    text = String(text || "");
    // 只清理音色下拉显示名里的括号备注，不影响真实 voice_id 和 audio_url。
    var oldText = "";
    while (oldText !== text) {
        oldText = text;
        text = text.replace(/[\s　]*[（(][^（）()]*[）)]/g, "");
    }
    return text.replace(/\s+/g, " ").replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, "");
}


function qwenMakeJavaStringList(items) {
    // J阅读内置 TTS 编辑页不要直接返回 Rhino NativeArray，否则“音色分类”可能显示 org.mozilla...。
    // 这里返回 Java ArrayList<String>，让编辑页按真正的下拉项读取：呱呱 / 游音。
    try {
        var list = new java.util.ArrayList();
        for (var i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
            list.add(String(items[i]));
        }
        return list;
    } catch (e) {
        // 兼容非 Android / 非 Rhino 检查环境。
        return items;
    }
}

function qwenNormalizeVoiceSource(source) {
    var s = String(source || "").replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, "");
    var lower = s.toLowerCase();
    // 明确选中“鹿/千问鹿/lu/qianwenlu”时才切到鹿库。
    if (s === VOICE_SOURCE_LU || s === "千问鹿" || lower === "lu" || lower === "qianwenlu") {
        return VOICE_SOURCE_LU;
    }
    // 明确选中“游音/音游/youyin”时才切到游音。
    if (s === VOICE_SOURCE_YOUYIN || s === "音游" || lower === "youyin") {
        return VOICE_SOURCE_YOUYIN;
    }
    // 兼容少数宿主把选项包装成 “label=游音” 一类字符串；如果同时含“呱呱”和“游音”，说明只是列表本身，默认回呱呱。
    if ((lower.indexOf("youyin") >= 0 || s.indexOf("游音") >= 0 || s.indexOf("音游") >= 0) && s.indexOf("呱呱") < 0) {
        return VOICE_SOURCE_YOUYIN;
    }
    return VOICE_SOURCE_GUAGUA;
}

function qwenMakeUniqueDisplayId(display, fallback, seen) {
    var base = guaguaStripBracketText(display || fallback || "");
    if (!base) base = "voice";
    if (!seen[base]) {
        seen[base] = 1;
        return base;
    }
    seen[base] += 1;
    return base + " #" + seen[base];
}

function getGuaguaDisplayName(rawName) {
    var no = guaguaExtractNumber(rawName);
    var display = rawName;
    if (no && GUAGUA_DISPLAY_NAME_MAP[no]) display = GUAGUA_DISPLAY_NAME_MAP[no];
    return guaguaStripBracketText(display);
}
function qwenMakeShortCloneId(prefix, rawName, index) {
    var no = guaguaExtractNumber(rawName);
    if (!no) no = String(index + 1);
    no = String(no).replace(/^0+/, "");
    if (!no) no = String(index + 1);
    // 只给 J阅读界面保存/显示用：短、稳定、没有长括号备注。
    return String(prefix || "G").toUpperCase() + no + "_" + index;
}

function qwenMakeOldShortCloneId(prefix, rawName, index) {
    var no = guaguaExtractNumber(rawName);
    if (!no) no = String(index + 1);
    no = String(no).replace(/^0+/, "");
    if (!no) no = String(index + 1);
    // 兼容上一版已经保存过的 create_voice_gg_数字_序号。
    return "create_voice_" + prefix + "_" + no + "_" + index;
}

function qwenMakeYouyinShortCloneId(index) {
    return "Y" + String(index + 1);
}

function qwenMakeLuShortCloneId(index) {
    return "L" + String(index + 1);
}



// ==================== 通义千问免登录认证：来自火山豆包2.0适配配置 ====================
var QIANWEN_AUTH_URL = "https://cnb.cool/xiatian.ktn/tts/-/git/raw/main/auth_qianwen.json";
var QIANWEN_AUTH_CACHE_FILE = "auth_qianwen_jread_nologin_guagua_v2.json";
var qianwenAuthCache = null;

function qianwenPad2(value) {
    value = String(value);
    return value.length < 2 ? "0" + value : value;
}

function getTodayDateStr() {
    var date = new Date();
    var y = date.getFullYear();
    var m = qianwenPad2(date.getMonth() + 1);
    var d = qianwenPad2(date.getDate());
    return String(y) + m + d;
}

function downloadQianwenAuth() {
    var headers = {};
    var urls = [
        QIANWEN_AUTH_URL,
        // 兜底：游音原插件可正常使用的免登录认证地址。原地址可用时仍优先使用原地址。
        "https://cnb.cool/mingwuyan/yinpin/-/git/raw/main/qianwen2.json?download=true"
    ];

    for (var urlIndex = 0; urlIndex < urls.length; urlIndex++) {
        try {
            var jsonStr = ttsrv.httpGetString(urls[urlIndex], headers);
            var remoteAuth = JSON.parse(jsonStr);

            if (!remoteAuth.nonce || !remoteAuth.timestamp || !remoteAuth.sign) {
                throw new Error("远程JSON缺少必要参数");
            }

            var localAuth = {
                nonce: remoteAuth.nonce,
                timestamp: remoteAuth.timestamp,
                sign: remoteAuth.sign,
                updateDate: getTodayDateStr()
            };

            ttsrv.writeTxtFile(QIANWEN_AUTH_CACHE_FILE, JSON.stringify(localAuth, null, 2));
            qianwenAuthCache = localAuth;
            return localAuth;
        } catch (e) {
            try { logger.e("通义千问免登录认证下载失败[" + urlIndex + "]: " + e); } catch (ignore) {}
        }
    }
    return null;
}

function loadQianwenAuth() {
    try {
        if (!ttsrv.fileExist(QIANWEN_AUTH_CACHE_FILE)) {
            return downloadQianwenAuth();
        }

        var jsonStr = ttsrv.readTxtFile(QIANWEN_AUTH_CACHE_FILE);
        if (!jsonStr || jsonStr.trim() === "") {
            return downloadQianwenAuth();
        }

        var auth = JSON.parse(jsonStr);
        if (!auth.nonce || !auth.timestamp || !auth.sign || !auth.updateDate) {
            return downloadQianwenAuth();
        }

        if (auth.updateDate !== getTodayDateStr()) {
            return downloadQianwenAuth();
        }

        qianwenAuthCache = auth;
        return auth;
    } catch (e) {
        return downloadQianwenAuth();
    }
}

function getValidQianwenAuth() {
    if (qianwenAuthCache && qianwenAuthCache.updateDate === getTodayDateStr()) {
        return qianwenAuthCache;
    }
    var auth = loadQianwenAuth();
    if (!auth) {
        return { nonce: "", timestamp: "", sign: "" };
    }
    return auth;
}

function getWsUrl() {
    var auth = getValidQianwenAuth();
    if (!auth.nonce || !auth.timestamp || !auth.sign) {
        throw "通义千问免登录认证参数获取失败：请确认网络可访问认证JSON，或先用原呱呱版成功试听一次以生成缓存";
    }

    var params = [
        "nt=5",
        "nw=wifi",
        "ve=6.1.5.2782",
        "pf=3300",
        "fr=android",
        "bi=37260",
        "pr=qwen",
        "sv=release",
        "ch=tongyi%40store_free_vivo",
        "os=15",
        "nonce=" + auth.nonce,
        "timestamp=" + auth.timestamp,
        "sign=" + auth.sign,
        "bizid=qwen-chat"
    ];

    return "wss://speech-tts.qianwen.com/api/v2/tts?" + params.join('&');
}


function check() {
    getWsUrl();
}

function generateId() {
    var chars = 'abcdef0123456789'
    var result = ''
    for (var i = 0; i < 32; i++) {
        result += chars.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * chars.length))
    }
    return result
}

function generateUUID() {
    return 'xxxxxxxx-xxxx-4xxx-yxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx'.replace(/[xy]/g, function(c) {
        var r = Math.random() * 16 | 0, v = c == 'x' ? r : (r & 0x3 | 0x8);
        return v.toString(16);
    });
}

// 判断是否是克隆音色 (忽略大小写)
function isCloneVoice(voiceId) {
    return voiceId && voiceId.toLowerCase().indexOf('create_voice_') === 0;
}

// --- 核心工具：生成WAV ---
function writeString(stream, str) {
    for (var i = 0; i < str.length; i++) {
        stream.write(str.charCodeAt(i));
    }
}

function writeInt(stream, val) {
    stream.write(val & 0xFF);
    stream.write((val >> 8) & 0xFF);
    stream.write((val >> 16) & 0xFF);
    stream.write((val >> 24) & 0xFF);
}

function writeShort(stream, val) {
    stream.write(val & 0xFF);
    stream.write((val >> 8) & 0xFF);
}

function writeWavHeaderToStream(stream, dataLength) {
    var sampleRate = 24000;
    var channels = 1;
    var bitsPerSample = 16;
    var byteRate = sampleRate * channels * bitsPerSample / 8;
    var blockAlign = channels * bitsPerSample / 8;

    writeString(stream, 'RIFF');
    writeInt(stream, 36 + dataLength);
    writeString(stream, 'WAVE');
    writeString(stream, 'fmt ');
    writeInt(stream, 16); 
    writeShort(stream, 1); 
    writeShort(stream, channels);
    writeInt(stream, sampleRate);
    writeInt(stream, byteRate);
    writeShort(stream, blockAlign);
    writeShort(stream, bitsPerSample);
    writeString(stream, 'data');
    writeInt(stream, dataLength);
}

function qwenAnalyzeNaturalSpeechText(text, lineType) {
    var s = qwenTrimText(text);
    var compact = s.replace(/\s+/g, "");
    var len = compact.length;
    var lt = qwenTrimText(lineType).toLowerCase();
    var hasQuote = /["“”‘’]/.test(s);
    var isDialogue = hasQuote || /dialog|对白|对话|台词/.test(lt);
    var isNarration = /narr|旁白|叙述/.test(lt);
    var commaCount = (s.match(/[，,、；;：:]/g) || []).length;
    var sentenceCount = (s.match(/[。！？!?…]/g) || []).length;
    var speedScale = 1.0;
    var volumeScale = 1.0;
    var notes = [];

    if (len >= 120) {
        speedScale *= 0.91;
        notes.push("长句要分层呼吸，语速略慢，避免一口气平推");
    } else if (len >= 70) {
        speedScale *= 0.95;
        notes.push("中长句按语义自然换气，不要机械连读");
    } else if (len > 0 && len <= 12 && /[！？!?]/.test(s)) {
        speedScale *= 1.03;
        notes.push("短句反应要像真人即时说出，起伏清楚但不喊");
    }

    if (isDialogue) {
        speedScale *= 0.97;
        volumeScale *= 0.98;
        notes.push("对白像对人说话，重音落在意图词上，别像播报");
    } else if (isNarration) {
        speedScale *= 0.98;
        volumeScale *= 0.98;
        notes.push("旁白稳一点，起伏来自句群和画面，不要每句都表演");
    }

    if (commaCount >= 4) {
        speedScale *= 0.96;
        notes.push("逗号和顿号只做轻停顿，句号才收束");
    }
    if (/…|——/.test(s)) {
        speedScale *= 0.95;
        volumeScale *= 0.96;
        notes.push("省略号或破折号要有犹豫、转折或气息变化");
    }
    if (sentenceCount >= 3 && len >= 45) {
        speedScale *= 0.97;
        notes.push("多句连续时保持段落层次，句间留一点空气");
    }

    if (!notes.length) notes.push("保持真人有声书口吻，轻重和停顿自然");
    return {
        length: len,
        isDialogue: isDialogue,
        isNarration: isNarration,
        hasQuote: hasQuote,
        commaCount: commaCount,
        sentenceCount: sentenceCount,
        speedScale: qwenClampNumber(speedScale, 0.82, 1.08, 1.0),
        volumeScale: qwenClampNumber(volumeScale, 0.86, 1.04, 1.0),
        instruction: notes.join("；")
    };
}

function qwenNaturalStrengthCurve(rawIntensity, hasEmotion, hasIntensity, emotionKey) {
    var raw = qwenClampNumber(rawIntensity, 0.55, 1.75, 1.0);
    var level = raw;
    if (emotionKey !== "calm") {
        if (hasEmotion) {
            if (raw >= 1.0) {
                level = 1.06 + (raw - 1.0) * 0.92;
            } else {
                level = 1.0 - (1.0 - raw) * 1.05;
            }
        } else if (hasIntensity) {
            level = raw >= 1.0 ? 1.0 + (raw - 1.0) * 0.78 : 1.0 - (1.0 - raw) * 0.90;
        }
    }
    return qwenClampNumber(level, 0.62, 1.72, 1.0);
}

function qwenEmotionIntensityValue(vScale, emotionScaleText) {

    var score = qwenClampNumber(vScale, 0.60, 1.65, 1.0);

}

        { key: "doubt", label: "疑惑试探", speedScale: 0.98, volumeScale: 0.96, words: ["doubt", "confused", "疑惑", "困惑", "迟疑", "试探", "不确定", "怀疑", "纳闷"], energy: "轻微悬起、试探", pace: "中速偏慢，疑问处放慢", stress: "疑问词和判断词轻重读", pause: "思考停顿，句中可稍停", breath: "平稳但带犹豫", tone: "略上扬、带探询", tail: "尾音上扬或悬住", articulation: "清楚自然", scene: "像边想边问", instruction: "明显疑惑试探。疑问词上扬，句中有思考停顿，语气不确定但字词清楚。" },
        { key: "calm", label: "平静自然", speedScale: 1.0, volumeScale: 1.0, words: ["calm", "neutral", "normal", "平静", "中性", "自然", "冷静", "普通", "旁白"], energy: "平稳", pace: "中速", stress: "自然重音", pause: "自然停顿", breath: "平稳", tone: "自然", tail: "自然收尾", articulation: "清楚", scene: "普通有声书朗读", instruction: "保持平稳自然，清晰朗读，不夸张表演。" }
    ];

function qwenBuildJReadEmotionBridge(request) {
    var requestEmotion = qwenFirstRequestValue(request, [
        "emotion", "emotionName", "mood", "scriptEmotion", "jreadEmotion", "jreadEmotionName", "scriptEmotionName", "emotionTag", "moodTag", "jreadMood"
    ]);
    var requestPrompt = qwenFirstRequestValue(request, [
        "emotionPrompt", "jreadEmotionPrompt", "scriptEmotionPrompt", "stylePrompt", "tonePrompt", "directorPrompt", "performancePrompt", "jreadDirectorPrompt", "scriptDirectorPrompt", "actingPrompt"
    ]);
    var previewEmotion = qwenReadPluginVar("previewEmotion");
    var previewPrompt = qwenReadPluginVar("previewEmotionPrompt");
    var previewHasEmotion = qwenTrimText(previewEmotion) !== "" || qwenTrimText(previewPrompt) !== "";
    var previewMode = qwenTrimText(requestEmotion) === "" && qwenTrimText(requestPrompt) === "" && previewHasEmotion;
    var emotion = qwenLimitText(requestEmotion || previewEmotion, 180);
    var emotionPrompt = qwenLimitText(requestPrompt || previewPrompt, 720);
    var requestVScaleRaw = qwenFirstRequestValue(request, [
        "vScale", "jreadVScale", "scriptVScale", "volumeScale", "emotionIntensity", "intensity", "emotionScaleValue", "jreadEmotionIntensity", "scriptEmotionIntensity"
    ]);
    var previewVScaleRaw = previewMode ? (qwenReadPluginVar("previewForceScale") || "1.35") : "";
    var vScaleRaw = requestVScaleRaw || previewVScaleRaw;
    var vScale = qwenClampNumber(vScaleRaw, 0.60, 1.65, 1.0);
    var emotionScale = qwenLimitText(qwenFirstRequestValue(request, ["emotionScale", "jreadEmotionScale", "scriptEmotionScale", "styleScale", "actingScale"]), 100);
    var roleName = qwenEmotionTextOrBlank(qwenFirstRequestValue(request, ["roleName", "speaker", "character", "characterName", "jreadRoleName"]), 80);
    var voiceTag = qwenEmotionTextOrBlank(qwenFirstRequestValue(request, ["voiceTag", "jreadVoiceTag", "roleTag"]), 80);
    var lineType = qwenEmotionTextOrBlank(qwenFirstRequestValue(request, ["lineType", "scriptLineType", "jreadLineType"]), 60);
    var lineText = qwenFirstRequestValue(request, ["text", "ssml", "content", "rawText"]);
    var textProfile = qwenAnalyzeNaturalSpeechText(lineText, lineType);
    var normalized = qwenNormalizeJReadEmotion(emotion, emotionPrompt);
    var hasEmotion = qwenTrimText(emotion) !== "" || qwenTrimText(emotionPrompt) !== "";
    var hasIntensity = Math.abs(vScale - 1.0) > 0.04 || qwenTrimText(emotionScale) !== "";

    var rawIntensity = qwenEmotionIntensityValue(vScale, emotionScale);
    var forceLevel = qwenNaturalStrengthCurve(rawIntensity, hasEmotion, hasIntensity, normalized.key);
    var levelName = qwenEmotionLevelName(forceLevel);
    var naturalIntro = "你是千问TTS Instruct有声书真人感配音演员。以下内容是语音表演指令，只能影响声音，绝对不能读出指令本身。";
    var strictText = "严格逐字朗读正文，不添加、不删除、不改写，不读出情绪标签、角色名、括号提示或导演提示。";
    var naturalRule = "表演优先级：原文清晰 > 角色一致 > 真人自然 > 情绪强度。参考音频只用于保留声线，不要复制参考音频里的电子感、机械感、过度二次元夸张或音质压缩感；输出要像真人有声书演员在近距离说话。不要把每个字都用同样力气；用轻重、换气、句尾和停顿形成层次。";

    if (!hasEmotion && !hasIntensity) {
        var naturalParts = [
            naturalIntro,
            strictText,
            naturalRule,
            "采用自然有声书口吻：逗号轻停、句号收束、问句自然上扬，长句中间要有换气感；尽量减少合成腔、播报腔和过亮的电子感。",
            "文本节奏提示：" + textProfile.instruction + "。"
        ];
        return {
            instructions: qwenLimitText(naturalParts.join(""), 1100),
            optimizeInstructions: true,
            emotionName: "自然真人朗读",
            emotionRaw: "",
            emotionPrompt: "",
            vScale: vScale,
            rawIntensity: 1.0,
            forceLevel: 1.0,
            forceLevelName: "自然控制",
            previewMode: false,
            emotionScale: "",
            speedScale: textProfile.speedScale,
            volumeScale: textProfile.volumeScale,
            emotionKey: "",
            directorSummary: "自然真人朗读；" + textProfile.instruction,
            naturalProfile: textProfile,
            bridgeVersion: "jread-script-emotion-natural-v4"
        };
    }

    var directorSummary = "情绪=" + (normalized.label || emotion || "脚本情绪") + "；强度=" + levelName + "；能量=" + normalized.energy + "；节奏=" + normalized.pace + "；停顿=" + normalized.pause + "；气息=" + normalized.breath + "；尾音=" + normalized.tail;
    var parts = [
        naturalIntro,
        strictText,
        naturalRule,
        "把J阅读正式台词本的emotion、emotionPrompt、vScale转成真人说话细节，不要像播报提示词，也不要为了情绪牺牲清晰度。",
        "情绪主要靠语速、重音、停顿、气息和尾音的小幅变化体现；除非文本本身很短很激烈，否则不要过度爆发。保持真人口腔感和呼吸感，避免塑料感、机械感、动漫腔过浓。"
    ];
    if (roleName !== "") parts.push("当前角色：" + roleName + "。保持该角色声线一致，只改变本句语气和情绪。");
    if (voiceTag !== "") parts.push("角色声线标签：" + voiceTag + "。不要改变成其他角色，只在此声线内表演。");
    if (lineType !== "") parts.push("台词类型：" + lineType + "。");
    if (qwenTrimText(normalized.label) !== "") parts.push("目标情绪：" + normalized.label + "。");
    if (qwenTrimText(emotion) !== "" && emotion !== normalized.label) parts.push("后台脚本情绪原文：" + emotion + "。");
    if (qwenTrimText(emotionPrompt) !== "") parts.push("后台脚本语气/导演提示：" + emotionPrompt + "。");
    if (qwenTrimText(emotionScale) !== "") parts.push("后台情绪强度标记：" + emotionScale + "。");
    if (previewMode) parts.push("插件试听情绪兜底已启用：当前试听没有JRead正式情绪，使用插件参数中的试听情绪/语气/强度。");
    parts.push("表演强度：" + levelName + "。强度只控制声音起伏，不读出数字。");
    parts.push("导演分解：能量" + normalized.energy + "；节奏" + normalized.pace + "；重音" + normalized.stress + "；停顿" + normalized.pause + "；气息" + normalized.breath + "；音色冷暖" + normalized.tone + "；尾音" + normalized.tail + "；咬字" + normalized.articulation + "。");
    parts.push("文本节奏：" + textProfile.instruction + "。");
    if (qwenTrimText(normalized.scene) !== "") parts.push("场景感：" + normalized.scene + "。");
    if (qwenTrimText(normalized.instruction) !== "") parts.push("按自然比例执行：" + normalized.instruction);

    if (normalized.key === "angry") parts.push("愤怒像压住火气后质问，靠咬字和短促尾音，不要整句都喊。");
    else if (normalized.key === "fear") parts.push("恐惧像呼吸变浅、起音发紧，尾音轻颤；不要平稳播报，也不要尖叫。");
    else if (normalized.key === "sad") parts.push("悲伤像强忍情绪，慢一点、尾音虚一点、句间留白一点；不要拖到失真。");
    else if (normalized.key === "pain") parts.push("痛苦虚弱要像力气不足但仍努力说清，短句之间可有吃力停顿。");
    else if (normalized.key === "pleading") parts.push("恳求要放低放软，停顿带犹豫，像小心翼翼地求对方。");
    else if (normalized.key === "surprise") parts.push("惊讶起音略抬，关键词上扬，反应后有很短停顿。");
    else if (normalized.key === "happy") parts.push("开心保持明亮和轻快，带笑意但不加笑声、不改词。");
    else if (normalized.key === "tension") parts.push("紧迫推进更快但不要糊，危险词重读，停顿压缩。");
    else if (normalized.key === "whisper") parts.push("低语压低声线，气声更近，音量收住但字要清楚。");
    else if (normalized.key === "cold") parts.push("冷漠更低更平，重音少，停顿干净，像故意保持距离。");
    else if (normalized.key === "tender") parts.push("温柔用柔软气息和暖色尾音，像安慰而不是播报。");
    else if (normalized.key === "mocking") parts.push("讥讽只在评价词和尾音带刺，不要额外加笑或改词。");
    else if (normalized.key === "shy") parts.push("羞涩声音轻一点，短暂停顿多一点，尾音收住。");
    else if (normalized.key === "doubt") parts.push("疑惑像边想边问，疑问词轻上扬，句中有思考停顿。");

    if (forceLevel >= 1.68 && normalized.key !== "calm") parts.push("强情绪也要像真人克制：短句可小幅爆发，长句保持呼吸和语义连贯。");
    else if (forceLevel >= 1.42 && normalized.key !== "calm") parts.push("情绪要清楚，但至少保留一半自然口语感，不要每个词都重读。");
    else if (forceLevel >= 1.12 && normalized.key !== "calm") parts.push("轻中度情绪：用一两处重音、停顿或尾音变化带出来。");
    else if (forceLevel <= 0.72) parts.push("强收敛：更低、更轻、更慢，像把情绪压住。");
    else if (forceLevel <= 0.88) parts.push("轻收敛：少外放，多靠气息和停顿。");
    parts.push("禁止把情绪说明当正文朗读；禁止输出额外音效词、括号说明、角色名提示或舞台提示。只生成原文语音。");

    var speedScale = normalized.speedScale || 1.0;
    var volumeScale = normalized.volumeScale || 1.0;
    if (normalized.key !== "calm") {
        var expressiveKeys = ["angry", "fear", "surprise", "happy", "tension", "disgust", "mocking", "custom"];
        var softKeys = ["sad", "pain", "pleading", "whisper", "tender", "cold", "shy", "doubt"];
        var expressive = false;
        var soft = false;
        for (var ei = 0; ei < expressiveKeys.length; ei++) if (normalized.key === expressiveKeys[ei]) expressive = true;
        for (var si = 0; si < softKeys.length; si++) if (normalized.key === softKeys[si]) soft = true;

        if (forceLevel >= 1.68) {
            if (expressive) {
                speedScale = speedScale * 1.07;
                volumeScale = volumeScale * 1.12;
            } else if (soft) {
                speedScale = speedScale * 0.92;
                volumeScale = volumeScale * 0.90;
            } else {
                speedScale = speedScale * 1.04;
                volumeScale = volumeScale * 1.08;
            }
        } else if (forceLevel >= 1.42) {
            if (expressive) {
                speedScale = speedScale * 1.04;
                volumeScale = volumeScale * 1.08;
            } else if (soft) {
                speedScale = speedScale * 0.95;
                volumeScale = volumeScale * 0.93;
            } else {
                speedScale = speedScale * 1.03;
                volumeScale = volumeScale * 1.05;
            }
        } else if (forceLevel <= 0.72) {
            speedScale = speedScale * 0.90;
            volumeScale = volumeScale * 0.86;
        } else if (forceLevel <= 0.88) {
            speedScale = speedScale * 0.96;
            volumeScale = volumeScale * 0.92;
        }
    }

    speedScale = speedScale * textProfile.speedScale;
    volumeScale = volumeScale * textProfile.volumeScale;

    return {
        instructions: qwenLimitText(parts.join(""), 2200),
        optimizeInstructions: true,
        emotionName: normalized.label || emotion,
        emotionRaw: emotion,
        emotionPrompt: emotionPrompt,
        vScale: vScale,
        rawIntensity: rawIntensity,
        forceLevel: forceLevel,
        forceLevelName: levelName,
        previewMode: previewMode,
        emotionScale: emotionScale,
        emotionKey: normalized.key,
        speedScale: qwenClampNumber(speedScale, 0.65, 1.42, 1.0),
        volumeScale: qwenClampNumber(volumeScale, 0.62, 1.38, 1.0),
        directorSummary: qwenLimitText(directorSummary + "；自然节奏=" + textProfile.instruction, 520),
        energyStyle: normalized.energy,
        paceStyle: normalized.pace,
        stressStyle: normalized.stress,
        pauseStyle: normalized.pause,
        breathStyle: normalized.breath,
        toneStyle: normalized.tone,
        tailStyle: normalized.tail,
        articulationStyle: normalized.articulation,
        roleName: roleName,
        voiceTag: voiceTag,
        lineType: lineType,
        naturalProfile: textProfile,
        bridgeVersion: "jread-script-emotion-natural-v4"
    };
}

        }
    },
    // 已移除所有用户输入变量

    "isNeedDecode": function(locale, voice) {
        return true; 
    },

    "onStop": function () {
        if (ws != null) {
            try { ws.close(1000, "stop"); } catch(e) {}
            ws = null
        }
    },

    "getAudioV2": function (request, callback2) {
        check()

        var rawRate = (request.rate == null ? 50 : request.rate)
        var speed = qwenClampNumber(rawRate / 50, 0.45, 2.0, 1.0)
        var volume = request.volume / 50
        var emotionBridge = qwenBuildJReadEmotionBridge(request)
        if (emotionBridge.speedScale && emotionBridge.speedScale !== 1.0) {
            speed = qwenClampNumber(speed * emotionBridge.speedScale, 0.62, 1.65, speed)
        }
        if (emotionBridge.volumeScale && emotionBridge.volumeScale !== 1.0) {
            volume = qwenClampNumber(volume * emotionBridge.volumeScale, 0.50, 1.50, volume)
        }
        callback = callback2
        
        audioState = {
            chunks: [],
            totalLength: 0,
            isFinished: false
        }
        
        var rawId = String(request.voice || "").trim()
        var finalId = rawId;
        var voiceInfo = null;
        
        // 如果是默认值，映射到具体音色（兼容旧配置）
        if (rawId === "" || rawId.indexOf("unknown1") > -1 || rawId === "longqiang") {
            finalId = "longqiang"
        } else if (rawId.indexOf("unknown2") > -1 || rawId === "longyan") {
            finalId = "longyan"
        } else if (rawId.indexOf("unknown_muyang") > -1) {
            finalId = "zh_female_quarkF531S0_ptts"
        }
        
        // 从所有音色中查找（包括内置克隆音色）。
        // 兼容两种保存值：新版干净显示名 voice_id、旧版 create_voice_xxx legacy_voice_id。
        var allVoices = getAllVoices();
        for (var voiceIndex = 0; voiceIndex < allVoices.length; voiceIndex++) {
            var v = allVoices[voiceIndex];
            if (v.voice_id === rawId || v.engine_voice_id === rawId || v.real_voice_id === rawId || v.legacy_voice_id === rawId || v.old_voice_id === rawId || v.display_name === rawId || v.voice_name === rawId) {
                voiceInfo = v;
                break;
            }
        }

        if (voiceInfo) {
            finalId = voiceInfo.engine_voice_id || voiceInfo.real_voice_id || voiceInfo.legacy_voice_id || voiceInfo.voice_id;
        }

        if (isCloneVoice(finalId) && !voiceInfo) {
            callback.error("未找到克隆音色映射，请点‘重新读取 / 选择插件音色’后重新选择一次音色：" + rawId);
            return;
        }

        req = {
            text: request.text,
            voice: finalId,
            voiceInfo: voiceInfo,
            speed: speed,
            volume: volume,
            languageType: "Chinese",
            emotionBridge: emotionBridge,
            reqid: generateId()
        }

        if (emotionBridge.instructions) {
            try {
                logger.i("[JRead真人感增强情绪桥接] emotion=" + emotionBridge.emotionName + ", key=" + emotionBridge.emotionKey + ", vScale=" + emotionBridge.vScale + ", rawIntensity=" + emotionBridge.rawIntensity + ", forceLevel=" + emotionBridge.forceLevel + ", preview=" + emotionBridge.previewMode + ", speedScale=" + emotionBridge.speedScale + ", volumeScale=" + emotionBridge.volumeScale + ", instructionLen=" + emotionBridge.instructions.length)
            } catch (e) {}
        }
        
        if (ws != null) {
            try { ws.close(1000, "restart"); } catch(e) {}
            ws = null
        }

        getAudio()
    }
}


function qwenNormalizeEmotionSampleName(value) {
    var s = qwenTrimText(value);
    if (s === "生气") return "愤怒";
    if (s === "害怕") return "恐惧";
    if (s === "焦虑") return "紧张";
    if (s === "激动") return "兴奋";
    return s;
}

function qwenEmotionCandidateNames(bridge) {
    var key = bridge && bridge.emotionKey ? String(bridge.emotionKey) : "";
    var raw = (bridge && (bridge.emotionName || bridge.emotionRaw || bridge.emotionPrompt)) ? String((bridge.emotionName || "") + " " + (bridge.emotionRaw || "") + " " + (bridge.emotionPrompt || "")) : "";
    var list = [];
    function add(name) { if (name && list.indexOf(name) < 0) list.push(name); }
    if (key === "happy") { add("开心"); add("激动"); add("感激"); }
    else if (key === "sad") { add("悲伤"); add("沮丧"); add("思念"); add("抱歉"); }
    else if (key === "angry") { add("生气"); add("严肃"); add("厌恶"); add("傲慢"); }
    else if (key === "fear") { add("害怕"); add("焦虑"); add("惊讶"); }
    else if (key === "surprise") { add("惊讶"); add("激动"); add("开心"); }
    else if (key === "tender") { add("温柔"); add("深情"); add("感激"); }
    else if (key === "cold") { add("严肃"); add("厌恶"); add("傲慢"); }
    else if (key === "whisper") { add("温柔"); add("深情"); add("思念"); }
    else if (key === "tension") { add("焦虑"); add("激动"); add("严肃"); }
    else if (key === "pleading") { add("抱歉"); add("悲伤"); add("温柔"); }
    else if (key === "pain") { add("悲伤"); add("沮丧"); add("害怕"); }
    else if (key === "disgust") { add("厌恶"); add("傲慢"); add("生气"); }
    else if (key === "mocking") { add("傲娇"); add("傲慢"); add("厌恶"); }
    else if (key === "shy") { add("尴尬"); add("温柔"); add("抱歉"); }
    else if (key === "doubt") { add("严肃"); add("惊讶"); add("焦虑"); }
    else if (key === "calm" || key === "") { add("自然"); add("严肃"); add("温柔"); add("开心"); }

    if (/开心|高兴|喜悦|快乐|欢快|兴奋/.test(raw)) add("开心");
    if (/悲伤|伤心|难过|低落|哭腔|哽咽|绝望|委屈/.test(raw)) add("悲伤");
    if (/愤怒|生气|恼怒|暴怒|怒|质问|斥责/.test(raw)) add("生气");
    if (/害怕|恐惧|惊恐|慌乱|发抖|胆怯/.test(raw)) add("害怕");
    if (/惊讶|吃惊|震惊|意外|错愕/.test(raw)) add("惊讶");
    if (/温柔|轻柔|柔和|宠溺|安抚|怜惜/.test(raw)) add("温柔");
    if (/紧张|焦急|焦虑|紧迫|着急|危急/.test(raw)) add("焦虑");
    if (/厌恶|嫌弃|反感|不屑|鄙夷/.test(raw)) add("厌恶");
    if (/深情|思念|想念/.test(raw)) { add("深情"); add("思念"); }
    if (/抱歉|愧疚|道歉/.test(raw)) add("抱歉");
    if (/傲娇/.test(raw)) add("傲娇");
    if (/尴尬|羞涩|害羞/.test(raw)) add("尴尬");
    if (/严肃|冷静|平静|中性|旁白|自然/.test(raw)) add("严肃");
    add("自然"); add("严肃"); add("温柔"); add("开心");
    return list;
}

function qwenAcgnTextHasAny(text, words) {
    text = String(text || "");
    for (var i = 0; i < words.length; i++) {
        if (words[i] && text.indexOf(words[i]) >= 0) return true;
    }
    return false;
}

function qwenAcgnSampleNaturalScore(sample, voiceInfo, bridge) {
    sample = sample || {};
    voiceInfo = voiceInfo || {};
    bridge = bridge || {};
    var name = String(sample.emotionName || sample.originalEmotionName || "");
    var sourceName = String(sample.sourceVoiceName || voiceInfo.source_voice_name || voiceInfo.display_name || voiceInfo.voice_name || "");
    var tags = String((sample.sourceTags || voiceInfo.official_tags || []).join ? (sample.sourceTags || voiceInfo.official_tags || []).join(" ") : "");
    var text = name + " " + sourceName + " " + tags;
    var score = 0;
    var duration = parseFloat(sample.durationSec || 0);
    var bytes = parseInt(sample.bytes || 0, 10);

    if (duration >= 10 && duration <= 26) score += 4;
    else if (duration >= 8 && duration <= 34) score += 2;
    else if (duration > 0) score -= 2;
    if (bytes >= 130000) score += 1;
    if (bytes > 0 && bytes < 95000) score -= 2;

    if (qwenAcgnTextHasAny(name, ["自然", "平静", "旁白", "温柔", "深情", "严肃", "伤感", "悲伤", "低沉", "难过", "害怕", "焦虑", "思念", "专业", "小说"])) score += 4;
    if (qwenAcgnTextHasAny(name, ["开心", "生气", "激动", "惊讶", "恐惧"])) score += 2;
    if (qwenAcgnTextHasAny(name, ["默认"])) score += 1;
    if (/^\d+$/.test(name)) score -= 2;
    if (qwenAcgnTextHasAny(text, ["机甲", "系统", "机器人", "电子", "电音", "机械", "怪物", "动物", "兽", "鬼畜", "疯狂", "广告", "客服数字人", "直播", "新闻播报"])) score -= 5;
    if (qwenAcgnTextHasAny(text, ["有声书", "小说", "旁白", "温柔", "严肃", "自然", "深情", "低沉"])) score += 3;
    if (qwenAcgnTextHasAny(name, ["笑声"])) score -= 1;

    var candidates = qwenEmotionCandidateNames(bridge || {});
    for (var ci = 0; ci < candidates.length; ci++) {
        if (name === candidates[ci]) score += 7;
        else if (name.indexOf(candidates[ci]) >= 0) score += 4;
    }
    return score;
}

function qwenAcgnBestSample(samples, voiceInfo, bridge, preferredNames) {
    if (!samples || !samples.length) return null;
    var best = null;
    var bestScore = -999999;
    for (var i = 0; i < samples.length; i++) {
        var sample = samples[i] || {};
        var score = qwenAcgnSampleNaturalScore(sample, voiceInfo, bridge);
        if (preferredNames && preferredNames.length) {
            var sampleName = String(sample.emotionName || "");
            var matched = false;
            for (var p = 0; p < preferredNames.length; p++) {
                if (sampleName === preferredNames[p] || sampleName.indexOf(preferredNames[p]) >= 0) matched = true;
            }
            if (!matched) score -= 20;
        }
        if (!best || score > bestScore) {
            best = sample;
            bestScore = score;
        }
    }
    return best;
}

function qwenSelectMultiEmotionSample(voiceInfo, bridge) {
    if (!voiceInfo || !voiceInfo.emotion_samples || !voiceInfo.emotion_samples.length) return null;
    var manual = qwenSelectedOfficialStyleSample(voiceInfo);
    if (manual) return manual;
    var samples = voiceInfo.emotion_samples;
    var candidates = qwenEmotionCandidateNames(bridge || {});
    var matched = qwenAcgnBestSample(samples, voiceInfo, bridge, candidates);
    if (matched) {
        var matchedName = String(matched.emotionName || "");
        for (var m = 0; m < candidates.length; m++) {
            if (matchedName === candidates[m] || matchedName.indexOf(candidates[m]) >= 0) return matched;
        }
    }
    var naturalBest = qwenAcgnBestSample(samples, voiceInfo, bridge, ["自然", "平静", "旁白", "温柔", "深情", "严肃", "伤感", "悲伤", "低沉", "难过"]);
    if (naturalBest) return naturalBest;
    var defaultName = voiceInfo.default_emotion_name || "";
    if (defaultName !== "") {
        for (var k = 0; k < samples.length; k++) if (samples[k].emotionName === defaultName) return samples[k];
    }
    return qwenAcgnBestSample(samples, voiceInfo, bridge, null) || samples[0];
}

// --- WebSocket 处理 ---
function getAudio() {
    if (ws == null) {
        var wsUrl = getWsUrl()
        if (!wsUrl.indexOf("wss://") === 0) {
            callback.error("URL 格式错误")
            return
        }
        
        var headers = {
            "Origin": "https://tongyi.aliyun.com",
            "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 16; PJX110 Build/UKQ1.231108.001; wv) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/4.0 Chrome/123.0.6312.80 Mobile Safari/537.36 AliApp(tongyi/6.1.5.2780) TTID/36335934394984@TongYi_Android_6.1.5.2780"
        }
        
        try {
            ws = new Websocket(wsUrl, headers)
        } catch (e) {
            callback.error("WebSocket 创建失败: " + e.message)
            return
        }

        var flushAllAudio = function(reason) {
            if (audioState.isFinished) return;
            audioState.isFinished = true;

            try {
                if (audioState.chunks.length > 0) {
                    var silenceDurationMs = 200;
                    var silenceBytes = 24000 * 2 * (silenceDurationMs / 1000);
                    var finalTotalLength = silenceBytes + audioState.totalLength + silenceBytes;

                    var stream = new java.io.ByteArrayOutputStream();
                    writeWavHeaderToStream(stream, finalTotalLength);
                    for (var i = 0; i < silenceBytes; i++) stream.write(0);
                    for (var chunkIndex = 0; chunkIndex < audioState.chunks.length; chunkIndex++) stream.write(audioState.chunks[chunkIndex]);
                    for (var i = 0; i < silenceBytes; i++) stream.write(0);
                    
                    var finalBytes = stream.toByteArray();
                    callback.write(finalBytes);
                    stream.close();
                    
                } else {
                    logger.w("无音频数据生成 (" + reason + ")");
                }
            } catch (e) {
                logger.e("写入异常: " + e);
            } finally {
                callback.close();
                ws = null;
            }
        }

        var lastDataTime = { value: Date.now() }
        var stopCheck = { value: false }

        ws.on('close', function (code, reason) {
            stopCheck.value = true;
            flushAllAudio("Close:" + code);
        })

        ws.on('error', function (err, resp) {
            stopCheck.value = true;
            flushAllAudio("Error");
        })

        ws.on('text', function (msg) {
            try {
                var data = JSON.parse(msg)
                
                if (data.code == 2000000 && data.data) {
                    lastDataTime.value = Date.now()
                    
                    if (data.data.audio) {
                        var audioBytes = ttsrv.base64DecodeToBytes(data.data.audio)
                        if (audioBytes) {
                            audioState.chunks.push(audioBytes);
                            audioState.totalLength += audioBytes.length;
                            try { logger.i("千问音频块: len=" + audioBytes.length + ", total=" + audioState.totalLength); } catch(e) {}
                        }
                    }
                    
                    if (data.data.status == 2 || data.data.status == "2") {
                        ws.close(1000, "done");
                        flushAllAudio("Done");
                    }
                } else if (data.code && data.code != 2000000) {
                    logger.e("API错误: " + data.message);
                    flushAllAudio("API Error");
                }
            } catch (e) {
                logger.e("解析异常: " + e);
            }
        })

        ws.on('open', function () {
            sendMessage()
        })
        return
    }
    if (ws.readyState == Websocket.OPEN) {
        sendMessage()
    } else {
        ws = null
        return getAudio()
    }
}

function sendMessage() {
    var chatReqId = ""
    try {
        var wsUrl = getWsUrl()
        var match = wsUrl.match(/[?&]hid=([^&]+)/)
        if (match) chatReqId = match[1]
        else chatReqId = generateUUID()
    } catch(e) {}

    var isClone = isCloneVoice(req.voice);
    
    var targetModel = "QUARK_VOICE";
    if (req.voice === "longqiang" || req.voice === "longyan") {
        targetModel = "QWEN_NLS";
    }

    var msg1 = {
        reqid: req.reqid,
        text: req.text,
        model: targetModel,
        vcn: req.voice,
        type: "stream",
        speed: parseFloat(req.speed),
        volume: parseFloat(req.volume),
        format: "pcm",
        status: 1,
        sample_rate: 24000,
        extra_params: {chat_req_id: chatReqId}
    };

    if (req.languageType) {
        msg1.language_type = req.languageType;
        msg1.extra_params.language_type = req.languageType;
    }

    if (req.emotionBridge && req.emotionBridge.instructions) {
        msg1.instructions = req.emotionBridge.instructions;
        msg1.optimize_instructions = req.emotionBridge.optimizeInstructions === true;
        msg1.extra_params.instructions = req.emotionBridge.instructions;
        msg1.extra_params.optimize_instructions = req.emotionBridge.optimizeInstructions === true;
        msg1.extra_params.jread_emotion = req.emotionBridge.emotionName;
        msg1.extra_params.jread_emotion_raw = req.emotionBridge.emotionRaw;
        msg1.extra_params.jread_emotion_prompt = req.emotionBridge.emotionPrompt;
        msg1.extra_params.jread_vscale = req.emotionBridge.vScale;
        msg1.extra_params.jread_raw_intensity = req.emotionBridge.rawIntensity;
        msg1.extra_params.jread_force_level = req.emotionBridge.forceLevel;
        msg1.extra_params.jread_preview_emotion = req.emotionBridge.previewMode === true;
        msg1.extra_params.jread_emotion_key = req.emotionBridge.emotionKey;
        msg1.extra_params.jread_speed_scale = req.emotionBridge.speedScale;
        msg1.extra_params.jread_volume_scale = req.emotionBridge.volumeScale;
        if (req.emotionBridge.emotionScale) msg1.extra_params.jread_emotion_scale = req.emotionBridge.emotionScale;
        msg1.extra_params.jread_force_level_name = req.emotionBridge.forceLevelName;
        msg1.extra_params.jread_emotion_director = req.emotionBridge.directorSummary;
        msg1.extra_params.jread_energy_style = req.emotionBridge.energyStyle;
        msg1.extra_params.jread_pace_style = req.emotionBridge.paceStyle;
        msg1.extra_params.jread_stress_style = req.emotionBridge.stressStyle;
        msg1.extra_params.jread_pause_style = req.emotionBridge.pauseStyle;
        msg1.extra_params.jread_breath_style = req.emotionBridge.breathStyle;
        msg1.extra_params.jread_tone_style = req.emotionBridge.toneStyle;
        msg1.extra_params.jread_tail_style = req.emotionBridge.tailStyle;
        msg1.extra_params.jread_articulation_style = req.emotionBridge.articulationStyle;
        if (req.emotionBridge.roleName) msg1.extra_params.jread_role_name = req.emotionBridge.roleName;
        if (req.emotionBridge.voiceTag) msg1.extra_params.jread_voice_tag = req.emotionBridge.voiceTag;
        if (req.emotionBridge.lineType) msg1.extra_params.jread_line_type = req.emotionBridge.lineType;
        msg1.extra_params.jread_bridge_version = req.emotionBridge.bridgeVersion;
        msg1.extra_params.jread_natural_speech = true;
        if (req.emotionBridge.naturalProfile) {
            msg1.extra_params.jread_text_length = req.emotionBridge.naturalProfile.length;
            msg1.extra_params.jread_dialogue_like = req.emotionBridge.naturalProfile.isDialogue === true;
            msg1.extra_params.jread_natural_pause = req.emotionBridge.naturalProfile.instruction;
        }
    }
    
    if (isClone && req.voiceInfo) {
        var emotionSample = qwenSelectMultiEmotionSample(req.voiceInfo, req.emotionBridge);
        var emotionSampleUrl = qwenResolveAudioUrl(emotionSample);
        if (emotionSample && emotionSample.text && emotionSampleUrl) {
            msg1.audio_text = emotionSample.referenceText || emotionSample.text;
            msg1.audio_url = emotionSampleUrl;
            msg1.extra_params.jread_selected_ref_emotion = emotionSample.emotionName || "";
            msg1.extra_params.jread_selected_ref_voice = req.voiceInfo.display_name || req.voiceInfo.voice_name || "";
            msg1.extra_params.jread_selected_ref_base_id = req.voiceInfo.source_base_voice_id || "";
            try { logger.i("[TTSOnline ACGN中文真人感增强版] voice=" + (req.voiceInfo.display_name || req.voiceInfo.voice_id) + ", scriptEmotion=" + ((req.emotionBridge && req.emotionBridge.emotionName) || "") + ", key=" + ((req.emotionBridge && req.emotionBridge.emotionKey) || "") + ", sample=" + (emotionSample.emotionName || "")); } catch(e) {}
        } else {
            if (req.voiceInfo.audio_text) msg1.audio_text = req.voiceInfo.audio_text;
            if (req.voiceInfo.audio_url) msg1.audio_url = req.voiceInfo.audio_url;
        }
    }

    var msg2 = {
        reqid: req.reqid,
        text: "",
        model: "QUARK_VOICE",
        vcn: isClone ? "zh_female_quarkF531S0_ptts" : req.voice,
        type: "stream",
        speed: parseFloat(req.speed),
        volume: parseFloat(req.volume),
        format: "pcm",
        status: 2,
        sample_rate: 24000,
        extra_params: {}
    }

    if (req.languageType) {
        msg2.language_type = req.languageType;
        msg2.extra_params.language_type = req.languageType;
    }

    if (req.emotionBridge && req.emotionBridge.instructions) {
        msg2.instructions = req.emotionBridge.instructions;
        msg2.optimize_instructions = req.emotionBridge.optimizeInstructions === true;
        msg2.extra_params.instructions = req.emotionBridge.instructions;
        msg2.extra_params.optimize_instructions = req.emotionBridge.optimizeInstructions === true;
        msg2.extra_params.jread_emotion = req.emotionBridge.emotionName;
        msg2.extra_params.jread_emotion_key = req.emotionBridge.emotionKey;
        msg2.extra_params.jread_force_level = req.emotionBridge.forceLevel;
        msg2.extra_params.jread_force_level_name = req.emotionBridge.forceLevelName;
        msg2.extra_params.jread_emotion_director = req.emotionBridge.directorSummary;
        msg2.extra_params.jread_bridge_version = req.emotionBridge.bridgeVersion;
        msg2.extra_params.jread_natural_speech = true;
    }
    
    // 第二帧不携带空克隆字段；鹿这类原生 create_voice_* VCN 不能带空 audio_text/audio_url。
    
    try {
        ws.send(JSON.stringify(msg1))
        
        var t = new java.lang.Thread(new java.lang.Runnable({
            run: function() {
                try {
                     java.lang.Thread.sleep(50) 
                     if (ws) ws.send(JSON.stringify(msg2))
                } catch(e) {}
            }
        }))
        t.start()
    } catch(e) {
        callback.error("发送异常: " + e)
    }
}

// ==================== EditorJS ====================
var EditorJS = {
    "getAudioSampleRate": function (locale, voice) { return 24000 },
    "getAudioFormat": function (locale, voice) { return "wav" },
    "getLocales": function () {
        var mm = {};
        for (var i = 0; i < TTSON_OFFICIAL_TAGS.length; i++) mm[TTSON_OFFICIAL_TAGS[i]] = TTSON_OFFICIAL_TAGS[i];
        return mm;
    },
    "getVoices": function (locale) {
        var mm = {};
        var selectedVoices = getVoicesBySource(locale || "全部");
        selectedVoices.forEach(function(v) {
            var display = guaguaStripBracketText(v.display_name || v.voice_name || v.voice_id || "");
            mm[v.voice_id] = {
                name: display + "（" + (v.emotion_samples ? v.emotion_samples.length : 0) + "风格）",
                gender: v.gender || "female"
            };
        });
        return mm;
    },

    "onLoadData": function () {
        logger.i("[onLoadData] 刷新数据...");
    },

    "onLoadUI": function (ctx, linerLayout) {
        try {
            var data = {};
            try {
                if (ttsrv && ttsrv.tts && ttsrv.tts.data) data = ttsrv.tts.data;
            } catch (e0) {}

            function readLocal(key, fallback) {
                var value = "";
                try { value = data[key]; } catch (e1) {}
                if (value !== null && typeof value !== "undefined" && String(value).trim() !== "") return String(value);
                try {
                    if (ttsrv && ttsrv.userVars && typeof ttsrv.userVars[key] !== "undefined") value = ttsrv.userVars[key];
                } catch (e2) {}
                if (value !== null && typeof value !== "undefined" && String(value).trim() !== "") return String(value);
                return String(fallback || "");
            }

            function saveLocal(key, value) {
                value = String(value === null || typeof value === "undefined" ? "" : value);
                try { data[key] = value; } catch (e3) {}
                try { if (ttsrv && ttsrv.userVars) ttsrv.userVars[key] = value; } catch (e4) {}
            }

            function dip(v) {
                try { return Math.round(v * ctx.getResources().getDisplayMetrics().density); } catch (e5) { return v; }
            }

            function addText(text, size, color) {
                var t = new android.widget.TextView(ctx);
                t.setText(String(text || ""));
                t.setTextSize(size || 13);
                try { if (color) t.setTextColor(android.graphics.Color.parseColor(color)); } catch (e6) {}
                t.setPadding(0, dip(6), 0, dip(4));
                linerLayout.addView(t);
                return t;
            }

            function addInput(label, key, hint, singleLine) {
                var input = JTextInput(ctx, label);
                linerLayout.addView(input);
                try { ttsrv.setMargins(input, 0, 6, 0, 0); } catch (e7) {}
                try { input.text.set(readLocal(key, "")); } catch (e8) {}
                try { input.hint = String(hint || ""); } catch (e9) {}
                try { input.setSingleLine(singleLine !== false); } catch (e10) {}
                input.setOnTextChangedListener(function(text) {
                    saveLocal(key, text);
                });
                return input;
            }

            function addOfficialStyleSpinner() {
                var currentVoice = "";
                try { currentVoice = String((ttsrv && ttsrv.tts && ttsrv.tts.voice) || ""); } catch (e12) {}
                if (!currentVoice) { try { currentVoice = String((ttsrv && ttsrv.tts && ttsrv.tts.data && ttsrv.tts.data.voice) || ""); } catch (e13) {} }
                var info = qwenFindVoiceByCode(currentVoice);
                addText("ACGN情绪/风格样本", 15, "#009688");
                var help = info ? ("当前音色：" + (info.official_voice_name || info.display_name || info.voice_id) + "；可用样本 " + ((info.emotion_samples && info.emotion_samples.length) || 0) + " 个。") : "保存音色后重新打开本页，可选择该音色下的ACGN情绪/风格样本。";
                addText(help, 12, "#666666");
                var spinner = JSpinner(ctx, "情绪/风格样本");
                var items = [Item("自动：跟随脚本情绪匹配", "auto")];
                if (info && info.emotion_samples && info.emotion_samples.length) {
                    for (var i = 0; i < info.emotion_samples.length; i++) {
                        var s = info.emotion_samples[i];
                        var label = (i + 1) + ". " + (s.emotionName || "默认") + "  e" + (s.emotion || "0");
                        items.push(Item(label, String(s.emotion || "") + "|" + String(s.emotionName || "")));
                    }
                }
                spinner.items = items;
                try { spinner.value = readLocal("officialEmotionStyle", "auto") || "auto"; } catch (e14) {}
                linerLayout.addView(spinner);
                try { ttsrv.setMargins(spinner, 0, 4, 0, 8); } catch (e15) {}
                spinner.setOnItemSelected(function(view, position, item) {
                    try { saveLocal("officialEmotionStyle", item && item.value ? item.value : "auto"); } catch (e16) {}
                });
            }

            addOfficialStyleSpinner();

            addText("试听情绪参数", 15, "#009688");
            addText("只影响普通试听；正式朗读优先使用预标注脚本传入的 emotion / vScale。", 12, "#666666");
            addInput("试听情绪（空=关闭）", "previewEmotion", "愤怒、悲伤、惊恐、开心、惊讶、低语、冷漠、温柔、紧张", true);
            addInput("试听语气提示", "previewEmotionPrompt", "例如：明显愤怒质问，咬字更重；压低声音，带哭腔", false);

            var scaleLabel = addText("", 14, "#009688");
            var seek = JSeekBar(ctx, "试听强度 vScale（对应预标注情绪滑块）");
            linerLayout.addView(seek);
            try { ttsrv.setMargins(seek, 0, 4, 0, 0); } catch (e11) {}
            seek.max = 145;
            var savedScale = parseFloat(readLocal("previewForceScale", "1.55"));
            if (isNaN(savedScale)) savedScale = 1.55;
            if (savedScale < 0.50) savedScale = 0.50;
            if (savedScale > 1.95) savedScale = 1.95;
            seek.value = new java.lang.Float(Math.round(savedScale * 100) - 50);

            function updateScaleLabel(rawValue, shouldSave) {
                var progress = parseFloat(rawValue);
                if (isNaN(progress)) progress = 105;
                var scale = (progress + 50) / 100.0;
                if (scale < 0.50) scale = 0.50;
                if (scale > 1.95) scale = 1.95;
                var text = scale.toFixed(2);
                scaleLabel.setText("试听强度 vScale：" + text + "    1.00中性 / 1.45明显 / 1.70强烈");
                if (shouldSave) saveLocal("previewForceScale", text);
            }
            updateScaleLabel(seek.value, true);
            seek.setOnChangeListener({
                onStartTrackingTouch: function(s) {},
                onProgressChanged: function(s, progress, fromUser) { updateScaleLabel(progress, false); },
                onStopTrackingTouch: function(s) { updateScaleLabel(s.value, true); }
            });
        } catch (e) {
            try { logger.w("[试听情绪参数UI] 加载失败: " + e); } catch (e2) {}
        }
    },

    "onVoiceChanged": function (locale, voiceCode) {
        if (ws != null) { try { ws.close(1000, "change"); } catch(e) {} ws = null }
        // 无需处理UI显示隐藏
    }
}

previewEmotion.name: 试听情绪参数｜情绪（空=关闭）
previewEmotion.hint: 普通试听没有JRead预标注情绪时使用。可填：愤怒、悲伤、惊恐、开心、惊讶、低语、冷漠、温柔、紧张。正式朗读优先使用脚本情绪。

previewEmotionPrompt.name: 试听情绪参数｜语气提示
previewEmotionPrompt.hint: 试听/兜底语气提示：可写悲伤压抑、愤怒质问、惊恐颤抖、温柔安抚等；正式朗读优先使用J阅读预标注脚本情绪。

previewForceScale.name: 试听情绪参数｜强度 vScale（对应预标注滑块）
previewForceScale.hint: 试听情绪强度：1.0自然，1.3明显，1.6强烈；正式朗读优先读取J阅读 vScale/emotionScale。

officialEmotionStyle.name: ACGN中文音色｜情绪/风格样本（auto=跟随脚本）
officialEmotionStyle.hint: 只列该音色有真实 referenceText+mp3 对齐的样本；auto 会按 J阅读脚本情绪自动匹配。
